name: Great Vow Zen Monastery
description: Great Vow Zen Monastery is a residential Zen practice center in Clatskanie, Oregon. Founded by Jan Chozen Bays and Hogen Bays, it is part of the Zen Community of Oregon in the White Plum Asanga lineage. The monastery offers residential training, retreats, and a heart of wisdom Zen temple. It is known for its integration of mindfulness into daily life activities.
